# Personal Data Protection Code

Jurisdiction: Italy
Region: IT
Citation: Codice in materia di protezione dei dati personali
Authority: Garante per la protezione dei dati personali
Source URL: https://www.garanteprivacy.it/home_en/italian-legislation
Topics: sensitive_data, children_data, employee_data, marketing_opt_out, security_breach, accountability
Keywords: Italian Privacy Code, Garante, Legislative Decree 196/2003

## Summary
Italy's personal data protection code as amended for GDPR, with national rules and Garante powers across sensitive, employment, telecom, and marketing contexts.

## Key compliance obligations
- Apply Italian national supplements and Garante measures.
- Check marketing, employment, and health-data rules.
- Maintain evidence aligned with Garante expectations.
